{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Assistant",
  "description": "At Grado Konnects, we specialize in transforming ideas into actionable strategies that drive growth for individuals and businesses alike. Our unique approach ensures that you receive tailored guidance with a focus on professional development and success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Administrative Assistant provides essential support to ensure smooth office operations.
	This role involves handling administrative tasks, assisting management, and maintaining efficient communication within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and organize office operations and procedures.
	Prepare and edit correspondence, reports, and presentations.
	Schedule and coordinate meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and other communications professionally.
	Maintain office supplies and inventory.
	Assist with filing, record keeping, and database management.
	Support other staff with special projects as needed.


Qualifications


	High school diploma or equivalent; associate degree preferred.
	Proven experience as an administrative assistant or in a similar role.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Strong organizational, time management, and multitasking skills.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Professional demeanor and attention to detail.


Key Skills:


	Calendar management and scheduling
	Data entry and document management
	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Problem-solving and initiative
	Confidentiality and discretion.


Benefits


	Competitive salary
	Health insurance and wellness programs
	Paid leave and holidays
	Professional development opportunities
	Friendly and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their &nbsp;updated CV to:&nbsp;gradokonnects@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-10",

Administrative Assistant Job at Grado Konnects




        
    

        
        At Grado Konnects, we specialize in transforming ideas into actionable strategies that drive growth for individuals and businesses alike. Our unique approach ensures that you receive tailored guidance with a focus on professional development and success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Administrative Assistant provides essential support to ensure smooth office operations.
	This role involves handling administrative tasks, assisting management, and maintaining efficient communication within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage and organize office operations and procedures.
	Prepare and edit correspondence, reports, and presentations.
	Schedule and coordinate meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.
	Handle incoming calls, emails, and other communications professionally.
	Maintain office supplies and inventory.
	Assist with filing, record keeping, and database management.
	Support other staff with special projects as needed.


Qualifications


	High school diploma or equivalent; associate degree preferred.
	Proven experience as an administrative assistant or in a similar role.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
	Strong organizational, time management, and multitasking skills.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Professional demeanor and attention to detail.


Key Skills:


	Calendar management and scheduling
	Data entry and document management
	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Problem-solving and initiative
	Confidentiality and discretion.


Benefits


	Competitive salary
	Health insurance and wellness programs
	Paid leave and holidays
	Professional development opportunities
	Friendly and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their  updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk / Customer Service Officer (Hybrid)",
  "description": "TravelDeer is a travel management company, based in Lagos, Nigeria, run and managed by trained IATA certified travel professionals who manage travel not just as a job/career but as a passion. We strive to bring the most exciting and exquisite destinations and experiences closer to our travelers. Doing the hard work so they don&#39;t have to - just to make their travel aspirations a reality.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / Customer Service Officer (Hybrid)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Are you a friendly and enthusiastic individual with a passion for travel and excellent customer service skills? TravelDeer Nigeria is currently seeking a Front Desk Officer to join our dynamic team!
	As our Front Desk / Customer Service Officer, you&#39;ll play a crucial role in ensuring our clients receive exceptional service and assistance during their travel experiences.


Responsibilities
Here&#39;s what you&#39;ll be responsible for:


	Welcoming visitors and clients with a warm and inviting demeanor, providing them with all the information they need.
	Handling incoming calls, emails, and inquiries promptly and professionally.
	Assisting clients with bookings, reservations, and travel arrangements, ensuring their needs are met efficiently.
	Providing information about our travel services, destinations, and packages, and offering personalized recommendations to clients.
	Performing administrative tasks such as data entry, filing, and maintaining records accurately.
	Supporting the marketing team with promotional activities and events as needed.


Requirements
To be successful in this role, you&#39;ll need:


	A National Diploma or equivalent qualification.
	A minimum of 1 year of experience in a customer service or front desk role.
	A genuine passion for travel and a desire to help others explore new destinations.
	Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills, with a polite and pleasing personality.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, with strong computer literacy skills.
	Resident in Ikeja and it&rsquo;s environs.


Pay
70,000.00 (NGN) - 80,000.00 (NGN) per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and a brief cover letter outlining why you&#39;re the perfect fit for this role to:&nbsp;hr@traveldeer.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	If you meet these qualifications and are ready to embark on an exciting journey with TravelDeer Nigeria, we want to hear from you!&nbsp;
	Join us in creating unforgettable travel experiences and making dreams come true for our clients at TravelDeer Nigeria!
",

Front Desk / Customer Service Officer (Hybrid) Job at TravelDeer




        
    

        
        TravelDeer is a travel management company, based in Lagos, Nigeria, run and managed by trained IATA certified travel professionals who manage travel not just as a job/career but as a passion. We strive to bring the most exciting and exquisite destinations and experiences closer to our travelers. Doing the hard work so they don't have to - just to make their travel aspirations a reality.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk / Customer Service Officer (Hybrid)

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a friendly and enthusiastic individual with a passion for travel and excellent customer service skills? TravelDeer Nigeria is currently seeking a Front Desk Officer to join our dynamic team!
	As our Front Desk / Customer Service Officer, you'll play a crucial role in ensuring our clients receive exceptional service and assistance during their travel experiences.


Responsibilities
Here's what you'll be responsible for:


	Welcoming visitors and clients with a warm and inviting demeanor, providing them with all the information they need.
	Handling incoming calls, emails, and inquiries promptly and professionally.
	Assisting clients with bookings, reservations, and travel arrangements, ensuring their needs are met efficiently.
	Providing information about our travel services, destinations, and packages, and offering personalized recommendations to clients.
	Performing administrative tasks such as data entry, filing, and maintaining records accurately.
	Supporting the marketing team with promotional activities and events as needed.


Requirements
To be successful in this role, you'll need:


	A National Diploma or equivalent qualification.
	A minimum of 1 year of experience in a customer service or front desk role.
	A genuine passion for travel and a desire to help others explore new destinations.
	Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills, with a polite and pleasing personality.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, with strong computer literacy skills.
	Resident in Ikeja and it’s environs.


Pay
70,000.00 (NGN) - 80,000.00 (NGN) per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume and a brief cover letter outlining why you're the perfect fit for this role to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	If you meet these qualifications and are ready to embark on an exciting journey with TravelDeer Nigeria, we want to hear from you! 
	Join us in creating unforgettable travel experiences and making dreams come true for our clients at TravelDeer Nigeria!
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "UI/UX Designer",
  "description": "Proforce Galaxies is an indigenous solution provider that proffer solutions to the myriad of new security challenges with the use of new discoveries in space and satellite technologies. Proforce Galaxies has the potency to offer top notch security surveillance of Homeland Security, Railway Track Monitoring, Crowd Control, Airport, Stadium, Border and Perimeter Surveillance and Oil &amp; Gas Facility Protection, Defence and Law Enforcement Agencies with the use of homegrown deployed satellite.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing intuitive, user-centered interfaces that deliver seamless and engaging experiences across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will play a key role in transforming complex satellite and geospatial data into clear, visually compelling, and easy-to-use digital experiences.


Key Responsibilities
UI/UX Design:


	Lead the end-to-end design process from research and wireframes to high-fidelity designs.
	Create user-centered designs using tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Develop intuitive interfaces that simplify complex data and workflows.
	Ensure consistency across all digital products through well-defined design systems.
	Conduct usability testing and apply feedback to improve user experience.
	Maintain accessibility and usability standards across all platforms.


Collaboration &amp; Innovation:


	Work closely with developers, GIS analysts, and Computer Vision (AI) teams to translate requirements into functional designs.
	Design interactive dashboards, maps, and geospatial visualizations.
	Contribute to documentation of design systems, components, and workflows.
	Stay updated with UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s or Master&rsquo;s degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2&ndash;3 years of professional experience in UI/UX design.
	Strong portfolio showcasing user-centered design projects.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and usability principles.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience designing for data-heavy applications (e.g., dashboards, analytics platforms).
	Familiarity with geospatial or map-based interfaces.
	Basic understanding of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React).
	Experience working with real-time or data-driven interfaces.


Why Join Us?


	Salary Range:&nbsp;N200,000 &ndash; N300,000 per month.&nbsp;
	This role offers the opportunity to design impactful digital experiences in the space-tech industry.
	At Proforce Galaxies Limited, you will contribute to shaping how users interact with satellite and geospatial data turning complexity into clarity through thoughtful design.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV,&nbsp;a&nbsp;Portfolio, links to past projects,&nbsp;Proof of hands-on experience to:&nbsp;hrgalaxies@proforcedefence.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

UI/UX Designer Job at Proforce Galaxies Limited




        
    

        
        Proforce Galaxies is an indigenous solution provider that proffer solutions to the myriad of new security challenges with the use of new discoveries in space and satellite technologies. Proforce Galaxies has the potency to offer top notch security surveillance of Homeland Security, Railway Track Monitoring, Crowd Control, Airport, Stadium, Border and Perimeter Surveillance and Oil & Gas Facility Protection, Defence and Law Enforcement Agencies with the use of homegrown deployed satellite.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Designer

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Proforce Galaxies Limited is seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to join our technology team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing intuitive, user-centered interfaces that deliver seamless and engaging experiences across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will play a key role in transforming complex satellite and geospatial data into clear, visually compelling, and easy-to-use digital experiences.


Key Responsibilities
UI/UX Design:


	Lead the end-to-end design process from research and wireframes to high-fidelity designs.
	Create user-centered designs using tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Develop intuitive interfaces that simplify complex data and workflows.
	Ensure consistency across all digital products through well-defined design systems.
	Conduct usability testing and apply feedback to improve user experience.
	Maintain accessibility and usability standards across all platforms.


Collaboration & Innovation:


	Work closely with developers, GIS analysts, and Computer Vision (AI) teams to translate requirements into functional designs.
	Design interactive dashboards, maps, and geospatial visualizations.
	Contribute to documentation of design systems, components, and workflows.
	Stay updated with UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Science, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2–3 years of professional experience in UI/UX design.
	Strong portfolio showcasing user-centered design projects.
	Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or InVision.
	Solid understanding of responsive design, accessibility standards, and usability principles.
	Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
	Excellent communication and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience designing for data-heavy applications (e.g., dashboards, analytics platforms).
	Familiarity with geospatial or map-based interfaces.
	Basic understanding of front-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React).
	Experience working with real-time or data-driven interfaces.


Why Join Us?


	Salary Range: N200,000 – N300,000 per month. 
	This role offers the opportunity to design impactful digital experiences in the space-tech industry.
	At Proforce Galaxies Limited, you will contribute to shaping how users interact with satellite and geospatial data turning complexity into clarity through thoughtful design.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, a Portfolio, links to past projects, Proof of hands-on experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Full Stack Developer (Web, Mobile & Desktop Applications)",
  "description": "Proforce Galaxies is a forward-looking advanced space technology and solution-focused company committed to delivering advanced satellite and space-based solutions that support national security, strategic intelligence, and critical infrastructure protection. Our capabilities are centered on the design, development, and deployment of high-performance systems that enable secure communications, real-time surveillance, and data-driven decision-making. At Proforce Galaxies, we are dedicated to strengthening technological sovereignty, enhancing situational awareness, and advancing aerospace innovation to support mission-critical operations and long-term national and global security objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Developer (Web, Mobile &amp; Desktop Applications)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time (On-site)

Description


	We are seeking a skilled Full Stack Developer to design, build, and maintain end-to-end applications that deliver satellite data and geospatial insights to customers across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will be responsible for both front-end user interfaces and back-end infrastructure, ensuring seamless, secure, and high-performance data-driven applications. You will collaborate with GIS analysts, cybersecurity professionals, and other developers to create intuitive and scalable solutions.


Key Responsibilities
Front-End Development:


	Develop responsive and user-friendly interfaces using modern frameworks (e.g., React).
	Build interactive dashboards and geospatial visualizations for satellite data.
	Integrate front-end applications with backend APIs for real-time data display.
	Ensure cross-platform compatibility and optimize application performance.
	Implement UI/UX designs that meet accessibility and usability standards.


Back-End Development:


	Design and develop scalable APIs and microservices (REST, GraphQL).
	Build and maintain server-side applications using Python, Java, or Node.js.
	Manage and optimize databases (SQL/NoSQL) for geospatial and time-series data.
	Integrate satellite data pipelines with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
	Implement security measures including authentication, encryption, and compliance standards.


General Responsibilities:


	Collaborate with cross-functional teams including GIS analysts and engineers.
	Conduct testing (unit and integration) to ensure system reliability.
	Implement CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment.
	Troubleshoot and resolve performance issues across the stack.
	Document code, APIs, and system architecture.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s or Master&rsquo;s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
	Minimum of 3+ years of experience in full stack development.
	Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and front-end React framework.
	Strong experience with backend technologies (Python, Java, Node.js; Django, Spring, Express).
	Experience with API development and microservices architecture.
	Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
	Strong problem-solving and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with geospatial tools (Leaflet, Mapbox).
	Knowledge of React Native or mobile app development.
	Familiarity with WebGL or 3D data visualization.
	Experience with real-time data streaming (Kafka, RabbitMQ).
	Knowledge of containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
	Background in secure application development.
	Contributions to open-source projects.


Salary Range
?250,000 &ndash; ?350,000 (Based on Experience)

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application, including portfolio and proof of hands-on experience to:&nbsp;hrgalaxies@proforcedefence.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Full Stack Developer (Web, Mobile & Desktop Applications) Job at Proforce Galaxies Limited




        
    

        
        Proforce Galaxies is a forward-looking advanced space technology and solution-focused company committed to delivering advanced satellite and space-based solutions that support national security, strategic intelligence, and critical infrastructure protection. Our capabilities are centered on the design, development, and deployment of high-performance systems that enable secure communications, real-time surveillance, and data-driven decision-making. At Proforce Galaxies, we are dedicated to strengthening technological sovereignty, enhancing situational awareness, and advancing aerospace innovation to support mission-critical operations and long-term national and global security objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Developer (Web, Mobile & Desktop Applications)

Job Location: Ode-Remo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time (On-site)

Description


	We are seeking a skilled Full Stack Developer to design, build, and maintain end-to-end applications that deliver satellite data and geospatial insights to customers across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
	You will be responsible for both front-end user interfaces and back-end infrastructure, ensuring seamless, secure, and high-performance data-driven applications. You will collaborate with GIS analysts, cybersecurity professionals, and other developers to create intuitive and scalable solutions.


Key Responsibilities
Front-End Development:


	Develop responsive and user-friendly interfaces using modern frameworks (e.g., React).
	Build interactive dashboards and geospatial visualizations for satellite data.
	Integrate front-end applications with backend APIs for real-time data display.
	Ensure cross-platform compatibility and optimize application performance.
	Implement UI/UX designs that meet accessibility and usability standards.


Back-End Development:


	Design and develop scalable APIs and microservices (REST, GraphQL).
	Build and maintain server-side applications using Python, Java, or Node.js.
	Manage and optimize databases (SQL/NoSQL) for geospatial and time-series data.
	Integrate satellite data pipelines with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
	Implement security measures including authentication, encryption, and compliance standards.


General Responsibilities:


	Collaborate with cross-functional teams including GIS analysts and engineers.
	Conduct testing (unit and integration) to ensure system reliability.
	Implement CI/CD pipelines for automated deployment.
	Troubleshoot and resolve performance issues across the stack.
	Document code, APIs, and system architecture.
	Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field.
	Minimum of 3+ years of experience in full stack development.
	Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and front-end React framework.
	Strong experience with backend technologies (Python, Java, Node.js; Django, Spring, Express).
	Experience with API development and microservices architecture.
	Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
	Strong problem-solving and collaboration skills.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with geospatial tools (Leaflet, Mapbox).
	Knowledge of React Native or mobile app development.
	Familiarity with WebGL or 3D data visualization.
	Experience with real-time data streaming (Kafka, RabbitMQ).
	Knowledge of containerization tools (Docker, Kubernetes).
	Background in secure application development.
	Contributions to open-source projects.


Salary Range
?250,000 – ?350,000 (Based on Experience)

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their application, including portfolio and proof of hands-on experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
